global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a logo, abstract shapes, and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to earn cashback with the VaultRun app.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the text 'VaultRun' in a bold font, set against a purple background.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one square, rendered in a light purple hue.

elements.label: Cashback message
elements.description: Text reading 'Earn cashback daily Built for peace of mind' in a clear, modern font, prominently displayed in white.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Built for peace of mind

elements.label: VaultRun title
elements.description: The word 'VaultRun' in a bold, eye-catching font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Install now' in a bold font, set against a contrasting background at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the body text in the center, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Earn cashback daily Built for peace of mind, VaultRun, Install now
